texto: To commit to loving a person for five minutes is easy. To commit to loving a person for the rest of your life, after you have met them, is a strong commitment. But when you commit to loving a person before you meet them and for the rest of your life, you have made the strongest commitment one can make to a relationship.
explicacao: Citação de Tom Houck sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “To commit to loving a person for five minutes is easy. To commit to loving a person for the rest …” articula fe, commitment, faithfulness em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como faithfulness e love.
